title: Requested applied and observed state shall remain distinct modeled concepts
expected_proof: state transition trace plus conformance assertion report

title: Restored profile and workspace state shall not be treated as live machine state
expected_proof: restore scenario trace, event log, no-write assertion

title: Graph live historical review and live-trace modes shall remain explicitly distinguishable
Authorization must precede command arbitration and apply publication
Restore workflows shall not reassert outputs as a side effect of UI or profile recovery
expected_proof: restore-origin event bundle with explicit no-output-write assertion

title: Alarm acknowledge cannot precede alarm assert
Return-to-normal cannot exist without prior asserted state
Stale degraded and disconnected timing thresholds shall remain distinct and explicit
Command timeout outcomes shall be explicit rather than silently abandoned
expected_proof: timeout event trace and outcome classification

title: Critical commands shall emit a durable event and historian evidence trail
expected_proof: proof bundle with event export and trace hash

title: Rejected commands shall record a concrete reason and origin
expected_proof: rejection reason event and audit export

title: Restore-originated actions shall be explicitly labeled as restore-originated
expected_proof: restore bundle with labeled origin chain

title: Alarm lifecycle changes shall reach historian evidence without silent omission
expected_proof: alarm historian export plus lifecycle trace
